brand.name: Volkstanz·Map
home.hero.title: Where tradition dances.
home.hero.subtitle: A quiet map of folk dance groups — from the Alps to the coast, from the Rhön hills across borders. Roots in home soil, steps into the world.
about.title: What is folk dance?
about.lead: Folk dance is memory set in motion — steps, songs and costumes handed down across generations. This map gathers groups that keep this heritage alive.
about.section.mission.title: Our mission
about.section.mission.body: We give folk dance groups a shared stage — visible, findable, connected. No commercial exploitation, no algorithm, no urgency.
about.section.privacy.title: Privacy
about.section.privacy.body: Addresses are intentionally published with reduced precision — rounded to neighborhood or city level. The map stays useful without becoming a finder tool for strangers.
about.section.consent.title: Self-determination
about.section.consent.body: Every group decides what gets published. Images and data appear only with the explicit consent of everyone depicted (§ 22 KUG).
submit.title: Register a group
submit.lead: Submit your folk dance group — after editorial review you will appear on the map.
submit.field.name: Group name
submit.field.geom.hint: Click the map to set the point. The exact position will be rounded automatically for privacy reasons.
submit.field.image.hint: JPG/PNG, max 10 MB. See consent below.
submit.consent.tos: I accept the terms of service.
submit.consent.privacy: I consent to the processing and publication of the group data in accordance with the privacy policy.
submit.consent.kug: I confirm that I hold the usage rights to the image and that all persons depicted have consented (§ 22 KUG).
submit.consent.branding: I consent to the image also being used in the project's social media channels (optional).
submit.success.title: Thank you!
submit.success.body: Your entry has been received and will now be editorially reviewed. You will not receive an automated confirmation.
submit.error.generic: An error occurred during submission. Please try again later.
footer.rights: All rights remain with the respective groups.
locale.cookie.name: Language
cookie.notice: This site uses only technically necessary cookies (session, language).
error.404.title: Page not found
error.404.body: The requested page does not exist — perhaps it wandered over the mountains.
error.500.title: Something went wrong
error.500.body: We apologize. The problem has been logged.
